name: Ninja-IX Phoenix Route Servers
notes:
We maintain 3 AS Sets in our ARIN IRR

AS-NINJA-IX-Phoenix-IPV4 for IPv4 only

AS-NINJA-IX-Phoenix-IPV6 for IPv6 only

AS-NINJA-IX-Phoenix-ALL for the combined list

AS 5118 is used for Route Server for Public Peering LAN . ALL PARTICIPANTS must peer with the route viewer /looking glass AS35940 on .2 / ::2 of the exchange IP Blocks.   

Peering with AS5118 will include any multi lateral peering participants, that have sent routes, connected to the route servers that select to send you routes plus ROOT Servers and AS112.

If you DO NOT peer with the route servers, PLEASE peer with our transit AS53698 to aid with monitoring and troubleshooting,  (This is how we obtain your mac address for SFLOW and other stats)
